meaning: n.譛溷､匁噺郛ｩ,鬚晏､匁噺郛ｩ
examples: Results The reasonable treatment was selected according to characters of ECG of ventricular extrasystole.
Methods The QT intervals of sinus excitation before and after extrasystole in 120 patients were measured and compared.
Objective: to probe the clinical effect of treating frequent ventricular extrasystole with Wenxin Granule and Atenolol tablet.
